roa.docketEntryComment: Order of Victim Restitution or CR-110 & Abstract of Judgment for Restitution (CR-111)
CR-110 SIGNED, FILED IN OPEN COURT IN DEPT 30
/CAL:RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/X:THE DEFENSE STIPULATE TO VICTIM RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $160 TO VICTIM SOHAIL SULEMAN/X:NO CR-110 & 111 PRESENTED IN COURT/CCU/

/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 18M:PJ20D/CTS:20/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/SUSFF/OBEY/WS/ACCEP/4019HALF/DISM3/SAORD/SA2:3118 18THST, SF CA/SAORD3/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TOTHE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:01-20-21/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30/DAWF/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED/MISDRED1:COUNT 1/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT/ACM/X:DEFENDANT TO ENTER HEALTH RIGHT 360 RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/VD:10-28-20ETTING/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 11-18-20/
/SHERIFF WARRANT DISCHARGE/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FORAN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/BAIL: 25,000/CONTD: 10-23-20 ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 11-30-20 (60TH)/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACEDON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SETFORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAKGROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/WEAP/RX/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER INFILE,/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/CONTD:RESTITUTION HEARING/TE:5 MINUTES/DOPU:ATTORNEY HAS AUTHORITY/
/CAL:TO SET VICTIM RESTITUTION HEARING/CONT/DOPU: ATTORNEY HAS AUTHORIZATION/
